Video.summary: Step inside a busy Bondi tattoo studio where tourists, backpackers and local hipsters flock to get inked. A brother and sister remember Mum and a Russian burlesque dancer shocks the staff.
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 1

Video.summary: Grand Final day in Bondi sees Brit boys mixing it up with quirky tatts and belly bling, a young Mother’s first time braving the needle and a visit from the studios eldest client – an 83 year old grandmother.
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 2

Video.summary: A new father commemorates birth, whilst a heartbroken son laments his loss. A client inspires with her brave attitude, and a recent divorcee gets inked for his new girl - but will their relationship survive the sitting?
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 3

Video.summary: John and Wendy put a potential new artist through the ringer, as Josh struggles to maintain order. Navy brothers on a mission and a breast cancer survivor marking her courage are followed by a night of hilarious antics.
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 4

Video.summary: Loud, proud footy fans ink their loyalty, while Aaron celebrates a different kind of faith. Dan helps a client through crippling pain, and as one extreme ink addict sends a message to society, so does ‘glamazon’ Mink.
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 5

Video.summary: From the guilty to the most innocent – and everything in between. Tensions peak as a staff meeting kicks off a busy day. A baby, a criminal, a heart wrenching loss, a pole dancer, a pin-up, and the biggest tattoo yet.
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 6

Video.summary: It’s a battle of the sexes for the highest pain threshold. Country girl Cas celebrates her new found confidence, while Rachel mourns her past. A risky tatt for Nan and patience wears thin as the studio is invaded by ‘blokes.’
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 7

Video.summary: Excitement is in the air with a VIP client. Julie curates her life on her skin, while Shaun helps Sandy through a crippling struggle. It’s a celebration of life, with clients and staff all weighing in.
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 8

Video.summary: In Episode 1 Nicky explores the spectacular Blue Mountains, Andrew gets down to the nitty gritty of car collecting, Snowy shows us his amazing Snowy burger. And introducing Dr. Mel and the wild and wacky world of fly ball.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 1

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 1
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 1
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 1

Video.summary: Nicky visits Bruny Island off the coast of Tasmania, Snowy shows us his authentic home style fish curry, we discover the perfect backyard garden, when you don’t actually have a back yard, and gold fever as Andrew gets the prospecting bug.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 2

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 2
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 2
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 2

Video.summary: In episode 3, the story behind some stunning quilts, the rock star spreading a heart felt message, Snowy shows us how to make cheese at home, and meet a group of women in whose case countless stitches are saving many very special lives.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 3

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 3
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 3
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 3

Video.summary: Nicky is in Wilpena Pound for an aerial flight over Lake Eyre, Andrew meets the clown doctors who dish out the best medicine of all, Snowy's recipe for a delectable mousse, and Shawy scales new heights as he explores high-rise gardens.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 4

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 4
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 4
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 4

Video.summary: We visit The Valley of The Kings where many of the Egyptian Pharaohs and their magnificent treasures were buried, Andrew has a heart-stopping adventure, and Dr Mel tackles some common myths and misconceptions about pets.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 5

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 5
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 5
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 5

Video.summary: In episode 6 Nicky is cruisin’ down the River Nile, Snowy shows us an exotic Vietnamese steamboat, and Dr Caroline tackles her fear of heights.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 6

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 6
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 6
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 6

Video.summary: in episode 7 Nicky is down at Hobart’s famous weekly Salamanca Market, Coxy joins us as special guest presenter, Snowy shares his nutty recipe for the perfect pasta and Tony shows us a gorilla-proof garden.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 7

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 7
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 7
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 7

Video.summary: In episode 8 Nicky visits the famed domes of the Bungle Bungle Range, Andrew brews up a storm with a few mates, Snowy shows us a fragrant red beef curry and we talk to Doctor Caroline on why being happy can keep us healthy.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 8

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 8
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 8
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 8

Video.summary: Sun, sand and sea … this is one spot you’ll definitely want to visit. Also this episode, Nicky finds out how to bring our wardrobes to life, and it’s back to school for Doctor Mel as she meets some dedicated two and four-legged volunteers.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 9

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 9
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 9
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 9

Video.summary: In episode 10, Coxy puts his hand up to go to Canada and can’t wait to show you around. Also this week Snowy’s super easy and hearty Brazilian bean soup and the benefits of weight training at any age.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 10

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 10
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 10
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 10

Video.summary: Andrew explores a beautiful seaside town with a feast of things to see and do, Snowy transforms humble rhubarb into an amazing desert, we look at uncovering the secrets of your family tree, and how to turn your garden into an edible oasis.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 11

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 11
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 11
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 11

Video.summary: This family of four have four completely different ideas on what sort of dog they want. Dr. Lisa has her hands full! Can she find the dog for them?
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 5

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 5
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 5
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 5

Video.summary: Dr. Lisa is given the job of finding a new family member for Cade & Matthew, still grieving the loss of their beautiful dog Callie. They want to find a new dog to join their family and help them heal the hurt.
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 6

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 6
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 6
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 6

Video.summary: Jo is a single mum with two little girls, she’d like a dog as part of their family. Jo loves running and would love a dog that can join her, but having two small girls a smaller dog might be better. Can Dr. Lisa find the right dog?
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 3

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 3
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 3
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 3

Video.summary: Lisa and Stuart are hoping to find a playmate for their daughter, Roxy. Roxy has a list of things that she requires in her new ‘bestie’, but are they achievable? Dr. Lisa will search high and low to find Roxy her little friend.
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 4

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 4
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 4
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 4

Video.summary: In the very first Just Go episode Rhys uncovers some hidden gems in the Victorian town of Bendigo. Lee learns the secret behind some delicious but healthy food, and Geoff Cox visits tropical Port Douglas.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 1

Video.summary: On Queensland’s famous Gold Coast Lee explores iconic attractions and dines at a very entertaining restaurant. Rhys tries out a fun, unusual way to get fit in Melbourne, while Geoff Cox takes Lee to see Australia’s magnificent red centre.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 2

Video.summary: Lee and Rhys explore Victoria’s Bellarine Peninsula. Lee finds foodie heaven on the delicious Taste Trail, while Rhys jumps aboard the Blues Train in historic Queenscliff. Geoff Cox discovers a capital way to see the sights in Canberra.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 3

Video.summary: Rhys tours the world-class wine country of the Yarra Valley in style. Lee taste tests a breakfast with a twist and experiences the tantalizing delights of African cuisine. Geoff Cox explores Sydney.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 4

Video.summary: Lee visit the New South Wales north coast and gets up close to majestic wildlife in Byron Bay, then heads south to Melbourne for a foodie fix that takes her back to her Chinese roots. Rhys and Geoff Cox head to Albury on the Murray River.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 5

Video.summary: Lee explores the Mornington Peninsula, a destination that offers plenty to see and do, then cooks up a storm Vietnamese style and shares some of her favourite recipes. Rhys and Geoff Cox discover the beautiful New South Wales south coast.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 6

Video.summary: Rhys explores the Victorian coastal town of Inverloch, finding some high-octane fun. Lee discovers a hidden gem amongst Melbourne’s skyline, while Geoff Cox experiences the beautiful Tasmanian wilderness near Strahan.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 7

Video.summary: Lee explores the other side to Queensland’s Gold Coast – its stunning hinterland and learns some tricks to cooking delicious cuisine from the USA. Rhys and Coxy take it up a notch in Yarrawonga, on the Victorian and New South Wales border.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 8

Video.summary: Rhys shares the secrets of Phillip Island - his hometown on Victoria’s rugged coastline. Lee travels to Alice Springs on the hunt for bush tucker, and Coxy enjoys the Queensland sunshine and plenty of activities in tropical Mackay.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 9

Video.summary: In this China special, Rhys soars above the clouds on his way up one of China’s most spectacular mountains, Geoff Cox takes in the sights in Tianjin, and Rhys visits Fenghuang, a picturesque city that hasn’t changed in three hundred years.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 10

Video.summary: Noelle and Luke have been living in an apartment, but with three children it was time for a house with a backyard and …a dog to play in that backyard! Can Dr. Lisa Chimes find them the perfect dog?
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 1

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 1
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 1
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 1

Video.summary: Single mum Jenny and her three kids live in a rented house with a big backyard and son Harrison wants a dog. The backyard is in need of repair and the family can’t decide on what sort of dog to get. Can they all agree on the one dog?
Video.title: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 2

Image.alt: Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 2
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 2
Dr Lisa to the Rescue Season 1 Episode 2

Video.summary: HOBART You need only scratch the surface to find evidence of Hobart’s convict past – but dig a little deeper and even more fascinating history is revealed.
Video.title: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 3

Image.alt: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 3
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 3
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 3

Video.summary: WOOLLOOMOOLOO From the Razor gangs of the 1930s to the Heritage Battles of the 1960s, Woolloomooloo has seen it all.
Video.title: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 4

Image.alt: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 4
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 4
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 4

Video.summary: You find some of the best product in Tasmania, from Lobster to beef to fantastic vegetables, milk, cream, cheese. Paul travels through North West Tasmania to discover the cray fishing industry, and how to make an intriguing cray stack.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 3 Episode 1

Video.summary: The Yarra Valley is one of the most picturesque places in the world. It's chock full of family producers and they're doing great stuff like free range pork, garlic, strawberries fantastic wine and some good beer and it's all on the menu.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 3 Episode 2

Video.summary: Alice Springs - Australia’s most famous outback town, is surrounded by some pretty harsh desert. With some local help Paul is going on the ultimate food experience: from beef to bush tucker, camel to kangaroo and a little bit in between.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 3 Episode 3

Video.summary: The High Country may make you think of the goldrush, or Ned Kelly riding around these very hills with his brothers. But nowadays it is also known for the great food regions like Beechworth, Milawa, Bright King Valley and others.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 3 Episode 4

Video.summary: with the Strzelecki Ranges in the north and the wild waters of Bass Strait in the south, South Gipplsland has some of the nation's most diverse countryside - and in between you’ve got wonderful fertile land producing great aussie produce.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 3 Episode 5

Video.summary: From the business power lunch to the romantic harbourside dinner, or the buzzing atmosphere of the city’s nightlife, there is no shortage of great places to eat out in Sydney.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 3 Episode 6

Video.summary: Melbourne is known for its amazing food, art, sport, music and beautiful gardens. Paul shows you the sites around his home city.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 3 Episode 7

Video.summary: If you’re looking for pristine coastline, brilliant cuisine, fun, adventure and excitement then Queensland Sunshine Coast is the place to be.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 3 Episode 8

Video.summary: Bordered by the Spencer Gulf to the east and the Great Australian Bight to the west, the Eyre Peninsula’s major towns of Port Lincoln, Whyalla and Ceduna form a triangle of tourism.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 3 Episode 9

Video.summary: Canberra is the political centre of Australia. On top of this it boasts some wonderfully diverse produce such as Galloway beef, heritage apples, a plethora of home grown fruit and vegetables, hazelnuts and some beautiful smoked meats.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 3 Episode 10

Video.summary: Andrew helps out an inspiring group of volunteers helping flood victims rebuild fences, Coxy explores Oslo, the home of the mighty Vikings. Also, Snowy whips up a fantastic seafood risotto, and Dr. Mel on the joys of adopting a new pet.
Video.title: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 12

Image.alt: Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 12
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 12
Guide to the Good Life Season 2 Int Episode 12

Video.summary: The Coral Coast is the picturesque region that stretches along Australia’s western coast, surrounded by beaches, marine life and national reserves it is truly an iconic destination within the country!
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 4 Episode 12

Video.summary: Our trip to Kenya takes us through the capital Nairobi where Paul Mercurio grabs some fantastic food and meets some wonderful people before he heads off to the south west districts visiting both Kericho and Lake Victoria.
Video.title: Mercurio's Menu Season 4 Episode 13

Video.summary: Back at the Bondi Clinic small West Highland Terrier Mr Pettibone arrives on the back of owner Henry’s Harley Davidson Motorcycle. The bikie dog has a persistent ear problem and Chris thinks he has the perfect solution.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 6 Episode 13

Video.summary: Dr Chris is called out to Edgars Mission on the outskirts of Melbourne to deal with an extremely rare case - Charity the lamb was born without hooves on her right side and without some form of intervention her life will be cut short. Chris suggests something untried on a sheep in Australia - prosthetics hooves.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 6 Episode 14

Video.summary: Dr Chris is called out to visit 42 year old Galah Pretty, who has a fast growing lump on his leg that is deeply concerning to owner Maurizio. Even though surgery on the old bird could kill it Maurizio is not keen on Chris’ alternative.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 6 Episode 15
